title: thelypteris deltoidea
intro: Thelypteris deltoidea, also known as delta-leaved lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris deltoidea include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried leaves in decoctions or infusions.
